title: Veal and Russian Dumplings with Bitter Greens
description: A hearty Eastern European-inspired dish featuring tender veal and flavorful Russian dumplings served with a side of bitter greens.

ingredients.name: Bitter Greens
ingredients.notes: such as kale or collard greens

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the Russian dumplings according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the ground veal and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the bitter greens to the skillet and cook until wilted.
Serve the veal and greens mixture over the cooked dumplings.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
